topic: My electricity bill is for a house that was demolished in nineteen eighty seven
title: My Electricity Bill Is for a House That Was Demolished in Nineteen Eighty Seven | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My electricity bill arrives every month for a house that was demolished in nineteen eighty seven.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open electricity utility bill on a wooden kitchen table, the service address line visible at the top, a coffee mug beside it, soft morning light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have lived in this rental apartment for two years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a small apartment kitchen with white cabinets, a stack of unopened mail on the counter, dim morning light filtered through blinds, no people in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The bill was always the same.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of three identical utility bills stacked on a desk, the envelope dates visible on each, dim desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last March I noticed the service address. It was not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close shot of a utility bill with a fingertip pointing to the service address line, the address printed differently from the mailing address visible at top, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand holding a folded paper map of a Midwest county, a finger circling an unfamiliar town name, dim ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove out to verify. The lot was empty.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty grass lot between two older houses, weeds growing through a cracked concrete foundation slab, overcast sky, no people visible, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a computer screen showing a county property records database, a row of search results visible on the page, dim office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The house was demolished thirty nine years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a printed property record document on a desk, a demolition date line highlighted in pencil, ambient lamp light, the rest of the desk in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The utility company confirmed the account is active and someone is paying.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a customer service chat window, the agent reply text visible on screen, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The autopay account is in my name. I have never set it up.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing an online banking transaction history page, monthly recurring payments highlighted in a list, dim desk lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last month the bill went up fourteen dollars.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a recent utility bill, the new charge amount visible at the top of the page, soft window light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Someone is using more electricity than they did last winter.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty grass lot at dusk, a single street light glowing on the corner, fog low over the ground, no structure visible on the lot, vertical 9:16 framing
